Ntc Of Mtn For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents & Truth Of Facts Be Admitted & Compelling Responses To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-29-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed.

Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories set #1, special interrogatories set #1, and request for production set #1 is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $586.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
